description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. Run three separate ubuntu jobs with matrix strategies across ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04, each with a different configuration: one with STL and tests, one without STL and with tests, and one with STL, tests, and forced C++03. For each job, check out the code, build with cmake and gcc, and run tests.
